subcodes.title: TALAIIGA
subcodes.first_line:
## TALAIIGA

Tavaeega e ia Koe, Te Aliki toku Atua!  Au e fakamolemole kia Koe, mai i Tou Igoa te le e seki ai aka loa s
subcodes.notes: Author: BH (Bahá'u'lláh). Teaching prayer (section TALAIIGA) -- 'I beseech Thee by Thy Name that no body can bear to hear, no tongue can utter.' Not found in inventory.
